/usr/bin/c++ -I/usr/include/qt5 -std=c++14 -fno-permissive -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-O1 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now          -Wl,-z,pack-relative-relocs -flto=auto -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/hud-service-exec.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/hud-service-exec.dir/hud-service-exec_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service-exec.dir/main.cpp.o" -o hud-service  libhud-service.a ../common/libhud-common.a ../libqtgmenu/libqtgmenu.a ../libqtgmenu/internal/libqtgmenu-internal.a -ldbusmenu-qt5 -ldee-1.0 -lgthread-2.0 -lcolumbus -lgsettings-qt -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 /usr/lib/libQt5DBus.so.5.15.18 /usr/lib/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.18 /usr/lib/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.18 /usr/lib/libQt5Sql.so.5.15.18 /usr/lib/libQt5Core.so.5.15.18
